# Skilo

> Share agent skills with a link. Publish and install SKILL.md files across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and every AI coding tool.

Skilo is a CLI and registry for sharing agent skills. Skills are directories containing a SKILL.md file with YAML frontmatter and markdown instructions. The CLI publishes skills to the registry and generates shareable links. Recipients install with one command. No account required.

- Install: `npm i -g skilo-cli`
- Share a skill: `skilo share ./my-skill` → returns a link
- Install a skill: `skilo add skilo.xyz/s/<token>` → downloads, verifies, installs
- Bulk share: `skilo share claude` → shares all skills from a tool at once

## Docs

- [Documentation](https://skilo.xyz/docs.md): CLI commands, SKILL.md format, supported tools, trust model
- [Claim a skill](https://skilo.xyz/claim.md): How to claim anonymously published skills
- [Full context](https://skilo.xyz/llms-full.txt): All documentation in a single file

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/yazcaleb/skilo): Source code and issues
- [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/skilo-cli): CLI package

## Optional

- [API health](https://skilo-api.yaz-b35.workers.dev/health): REST API status
- Resolve a share link: `GET https://skilo-api.yaz-b35.workers.dev/v1/skills/share/:token` → skill metadata + tarball URL
- Resolve a pack: `GET https://skilo-api.yaz-b35.workers.dev/v1/packs/:token` → pack with skill list
- Skill content is the SKILL.md file inside the tarball. The site renders it at `/s/:token`.
